name: legalease
description: LegalEase - 法律援助智能助手 Android App
author: LegalEase Team

scripts.android:install: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.android:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ./legalease-debug.apk
